programme.desc: A baby girl is stolen from her mother in a crowded area in broad daylight and the investigation takes an unlikely turn when CSI discovers that the mother's husband is not the biological father.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: With the help of Wolfe and an ATF agent, Horatio stages his own death as part of a plan to get Ron Saris and a shipment of fused-alloy bullets off the street.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The investigation of a badly burned corpse at a beach party leads CSI to a fuel smuggling ring with ties to human trafficking.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A sadistic killer of young women strikes again, one year after the original crime. However, CSI soon discovers that the trail may lead back to the police officer who investigated the original crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating a homicide at a seedy motel, CSI discovers that Delko has been staying at the hotel and may have been the target of a shooting himself.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A reformed gang leader recently out of prison offers to help Horatio bring down his gang from the inside after it is suspected to be involved in the death of a community leader.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia is found walking the street in a daze, covered with blood from a triple homicide. But did he commit the crime or witness it?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As CSI investigates the murder of a horse owner at a racetrack in his luxury box, Horatio uncovers a plot to fix races involving an old nemesis from the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: New evidence proves that a man recently convicted of murder is innocent. But are his defense attorney and judge conspiring to keep him behind bars to protect the real killer?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Defense attorney Derek Powell's fiancee is killed during a yacht heist, but the investigation may be compromised when Delko's citizenship is questioned and he is threatened with deportation to Cuba.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is hanged from a gazebo during his ex-wife's divorce party, and the investigation reveals that he was leading a double life. Meanwhile, Horatio gets Kyle a job working with the medical examiner.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flight attendant is found dead after a flight in the baggage claim area, and the suspects include jealous co-workers, a drug smuggling Federal Air Marshal, and a pilot cheating on his wife.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While CSI investigates a series of burglaries, Horatio discovers that the team is being watched by Russian mobster Ivan Sarnoff.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Russian mobsters kidnap Wolfe and try to influence him to clear one of their associates who is a suspect in a robbery homicide case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon is killed by a wood chipper. During the investigation, Horatio discovers that his old nemesis Ron Saris is still alive and was one of the dead plastic surgeon's patients.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: One of the finalists in a Bachelor style reality show is killed, and the team must find the killer among the other contestants, the host, and perhaps even the Bachelor himself.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo Mini

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie and Nate are gearing up for the town's largest event. When an issue with the new wine puts things in jeopardy, the relationship and the partnership will be put to test.

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Actor and craftsman Luke Macfarlane alongside designer Oliva Westbrooks bring heart, home, and hope to life-changing renovations - proving that sometimes, the greatest transformations begin from within.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Say Goodbye to the Grand Duchess of Greed Part 1
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying, construction and renovations, fishing, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Join Jeni and her friends as they travel to northern Michigan in the middle of winter. The focus of this series is to learn more about God's character through great women of the bible.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: When a business is new, it's not strange that all decisions need to be made by the key business leader. However, as the business grows, that leader may begin feeling tired, lonely and without hope.

programme.title: St Patrick: Pilgrimage to Peace
programme.desc: St Patrick may be the most popular, yet least-known, figure in history. The average person likely has no idea who he was. Go beyond the revelry to discover the real St Patrick, a man whose life continues to call us to the peace of Christ.

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Keys to Good Success Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is baptism required for salvation? What about death bed confessions?

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Stay Seated in God_s Supernatural Rest - Part 1
programme.desc: God doesn't want your life to feel like a constant struggle. Learn biblical truths that will help you "sit" in a place of supernatural rest.

programme.title: The Mercy Ship
programme.desc: Follow seven medical professionals from Northern Ireland travelling to Madagascar to volunteer on the floating hospital ship the Africa Mercy, a converted luxury cruise ship.

programme.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries
programme.desc: After Cheryl's devastating breakup, her aunt offers her an escape from Chicago to the Amish town of Sugarcreek. Struggling, Cheryl uncovers an unsettling secret that could disrupt the small town.

programme.title: Once We Were Slaves
programme.desc: 2,000 years ago, two Jewish prisoners await their fate in a Jerusalem jail cell. One, a criminal, the other, a rabbinical student. They realise they both met a mysterious man who changed their lives forever.

programme.title: County Rescue
programme.desc: With Duke's return fast approaching, Dani realizes her job is on the line; she questions God's path for her as she discovers her ex-fiance is back in town and faces a family emergency.

programme.sub-title: The Transforming Grace of God/Listening To God
programme.desc: Dr Stanley tackles important life issues such as parenting, personal crises, and relationships, fervently believing the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, reflected in his teaching.

programme.desc: A Nantucket bookstore owner known for matching others finds love and direction in life after agreeing to review a famous author's new novel in her blind-date-with-a-book club after he visits her store.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Keys to Good Success Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Lessons from Philippians: Loving God's Way
programme.desc: Continuing his series in Philippians with his message, Loving God's Way, Pastor Bayless explains that God's love is meant to be expressed through giving and forgiving.

programme.title: Everytown Downunder
programme.desc: Follow Australia's most travelled music evangelist, Steve Grace and his team on a 25,000km road trip, performing 78 concerts, sharing faith journeys and experiencing Australia.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Overcoming the effects of trauma and PTSD is possible through treatment which focuses on processing the trauma into memories and restoring a sense of safety both cognitively and emotionally. With guest Ruth Whitford.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.sub-title: The Power of Good: Ian Warren
programme.desc: Thinking that you need to be great, before you start to do good is a misguided mindset. When people engage in doing good as a business mindset, it leads to success, including better financial outcomes.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Globalism is predicted in multiple Bible prophecies, and it's vital for us to understand what it means and how it affects our future.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham over 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: How do you feel about yourself? Today, Joyce shares how God's unconditional love helps you stop comparing yourself to others and encourages you to receive God's grace!

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.desc: Farhaan, Hannah, Olivia and Tom are asked to follow a surprise classic French recipe for madeleines. Then things get messy as the bakers get stuck into their show-stopping ultimate chocolate gateaux.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Allegra McEvedy and Graham Hornigold set four more wannabe bakers two more challenges. Their baking know-how is tested with a surprise recipe for a chequerboard biscuit that requires mathematical precision.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Euan, Lucy, Peter and Sienna face bread for the first time in these heats. Judges Graham and Allegra want them to make Indian rotis. In the showstopper challenge, the bakers must produce pull-apart cupcakes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Graham and Allegra set the latest batch of bakers the Technical Challenge of a salted caramel cake. In their Showstopper, the bakers are challenged to create biscuits that represent their love of music.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Alice, Corey, Finlay and Sufia are tested on their ability to make stained glass window biscuits. For the Showstopper Challenge, the bakers have to bake their dream birthday cake full of personality and creativity.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Alfie, Andrea, Freddie and Lucy must bake technically-challenging cheese soda bread. Then, it's all about cake pops for the showstopper, where the bakers need to prove they've got what it takes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Ben, Darcey, Isabel and Will, enter the famous tent to attempt a pineapple and blueberry upside-down cake in the technical challenge. The showstopper sees the wannabe bakers depict their lives in biscuit form.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The technical challenge gets hosts Sam and Mark very excited as it's their favourite pudding: a good old-fashioned Jam Roly-Poly. The bakers must create a show-stopping Inside Out Cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: On the hottest day in the tent so far, the bakers must produce a 3D biscuit construction depicting an iconic landmark. The bakers race against the clock and the temperature to keep their biscuit creations vertical.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges have turned the challenges up a notch starting with Graham's recipe for a Paris-Brest choux pastry ring. Then the bakers have to come up with their show-stopping version of a decorative fruit pie.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Each of the five young hopefuls must produce one of Allegra's recipes for a meringue en bouche. Then, their pastry-making skills are tested with showstopping mini tarts, which must have a scary theme.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges examine the bakers' knowledge with a series of tough Technical Tests. Then they get to show off their sculpting skills by creating bread buns in the shape of animals. Who will bake their way to success?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the final, and the last four bakers enter the Bake-Off tent to face their first Signature Challenge. While the challenge itself isn't a surprise, the celebrity guests who they are baking for are.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The four finalists have to bake like they've never baked before as they face the final challenge - creating a tiered, layered, show-stopping enchanted woodland-themed cake, in just two and a half hours.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Allegra McEvedy and Bake Off winner, Nadiya Hussain, have the tough job of finding Britain's best young baker in the most intense baking competition yet. Expect spectacular bakes and others which topple and fall.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The contestants' baking knowledge and skills are put to the test when they are asked to follow Nadiya's surprise recipe for shortbread peanut butter squares.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The four bakers entering the third heat of Junior Bake Off have the mammoth task of flipping 12 uniform pancakes to produce a glossy chocolate-covered pancake cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take inspiration from their travels for Showstopper International Cakes which transport the judges from Denmark, to Iran and via The Caribbean to Australia.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The judges set the bakers a 100 percent British Technical Challenge - but with a twist. It's Allegra's surprise recipe for squashed fly scones, accompanied by home-made jam and cream.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers tackle a food illusion showstopper to create sweet bakes that look like a savoury meal. Who will perform the magic to conjure a place in the quarterfinals?

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are tasked with making an identical batch of prune and carrot cupcakes topped with beautifully uniform piped frosting.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The Technical Challenge is one of Allegra's recipes for pizzetta Bianchi. Then, the bakers have to invent a dessert in show-stopping cake form.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: This episode's technical recipe is for a British classic: Battenburg but with a bit of a twist. Then, the bakers produce a showstopping selfie on a giant cookie.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the last day of the heats and just one place remains in the quarterfinals. For the Showstopper Challenge, the bakers must showcase their artistic side, creating detailed artwork on a painted cake.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the start of Finals Week, where 40 bakers have been reduced to just 10, and this episode the first five quarterfinalists enter the Bake Off tent, all targeting a place in the semifinals.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the second quarterfinal, and the Technical Bake sees the bakers tied up in doughy knots as they try to follow Allegra's recipe for baked pretzels and dip.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The semifinalists face a gruelling technical knowledge test - including creating a perfectly-plaited loaf plus a blindfolded taste challenge.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers must produce two different canapes made with rough puff pastry for their first-ever Signature Challenge, and while the bakes themselves aren't a surprise, the guests they'll be making them for are.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: From the 40 bakers who entered the tent, there are now only three, and one of them will be crowned champion. Everything rests on what the finalists bake this episode.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The first heat of 10 junior bakers enter the Bake Off tent for two exciting baking challenges. Bakers are asked to follow Prue's surprise recipe for a tea party classic.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's biscuit day and the heat A bakers return to the Bake Off tent for two exciting baking challenges.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers get stuck into a messy technical challenge working with sticky swirls of dough designed to test their baking prowess.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's dessert day on Junior Bake Off and Prue and Liam are looking for the bakers to produce the perfect finale to any meal.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: To earn their place, the bakers need to impress judges Prue and Liam with their pastry plaiting skills while making a fiddly, vegetarian classic pastry.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Bakers need to demonstrate they have a light touch and steady hand as they are faced with Prue's recipe for a children's party favourite given a sophisticated update.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's their moment to shine as the bakers are asked to create a "biscuit picture of your best day ever", a chance to show off their skills and tell the judges something about themselves.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: In the technical, they need to brush up on their chef skills alongside their baking knowledge as they prepare a delicious breakfast using one of Liam's favourite recipes.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's dessert day and the bakers must produce delicious, sweet creations for judges Prue and Liam.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off

programme.desc: Brads truck trek starts with massive smoked beef ribs; ramen with pork belly; gooey butter cake topped with strawberry sauce and honey goat cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy grabs a little surf, turf and flavours from the earth. In Puerto Rico, a local gem is serving off-the-hook pork trifongo and shrimp empanadas.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Handicap golf pro Dennis Walters wants Dave to suicide his doors, repaint the car and de-pimp his ride.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: A semi hauler comes in for a makeover, and since KevDogg's the resident truck expert, he takes centre stage on the design and oversees the build.

programme.title: Hot Rod Garage
programme.desc: Hot Rod Garage is inventing a holiday: HRG Day is where we rent a dragstrip, order up a taco cart, and invite our friends to come and play cars!

programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mum is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past; Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Eric Delko returns to work on a case, proving if a man on death row is affirmatively innocent or not.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A dead body falls from the sky, and the team discovers that he had been a passenger on a private commercial space flight.

programme.title: HumanKind

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook

programme.title: Friends and Heroes

programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Comedy All-Stars
programme.sub-title: Jeff Allen Hosts Lace Larrabee, Dan Mengini, and Dale Jones
programme.desc: Family-friendly comedians present a night of clean, feel-good laughter. Featuring top talent who prove you don't need crude jokes to be funny, this series delivers quick wit.

programme.title: The Week that Changed the World
programme.desc: Journey step by step through the events of Holy Week, shedding light on the key players, unravelling the political intrigue, and answering longstanding questions about what happened, and why.

programme.title: Veggie Tales - An Easter Carol
programme.desc: Ebenezer Nezzer is out of control! Filling London with plastic Easter eggs, he's on a rampage to make Easter "bigger than ever!"

programme.title: Heavens to Betsy
programme.desc: All aspiring author Betsy Simon wants is a little success. Frustrated by yet another rejection, Betsy cries out to God. But then Betsy is caught in an alternative universe, and learns why some prayers are best left unanswered!

programme.title: What Rhymes with Reason
programme.desc: Tragedy ignites a group of teens on a quest to find a legendary landmark hidden in the wilderness. Together, they navigate the adventure while confronting the darkness within themselves.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Keys to Good Success Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-3
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus in a practical way.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Miami meets Havana when Mike gets dinner and a show at an authentic Cuban restaurant; Mike gets the scoop on the coolest ice cream spot and hottest beaches Miami has to offer.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Expectations
programme.desc: Avery and Peter try to keep romance alive while renovating their old house and juggling work, but everything changes when they get news they've been hoping for.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Your Thoughts Affect Your Physical and Emotional Health - Part 2
programme.desc: Learn how healthy thinking can impact your physical well-being and emotional health, and help you live with greater peace and strength.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Globalism is predicted in multiple Bible prophecies, and it's vital for us to understand what it means and how it affects our future.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Police rescue a child from kidnapping. A man is apprehended with crack cocaine and a tech 9 gun. A vehicle is stopped for suspicious driving and plates that are registered to another car.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: This episode kicks off with a high-speed pursuit reaching nearly 150 mph. Coups and the team chase a fast Mercedes that bolts away.

programme.desc: A collision leaves a mother & family critical. A man suffers spinal injuries after a tree fall & grandparents find their grandson not breathing.

programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.
